div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 213px; height: 1px; padding-top: 59px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
/eval-run
--config

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Step 0: Discover Config
run discover.py
1 found: auto-select
many: ask user
read skill, runner, dataset,
judges, models
state.py init flags
